# Eckel Plumbing Co

## Summary
Eckel Plumbing Co is a family-owned plumbing company in West Harrison, Indiana, serving the tri-state area since 1976. Known for fast response times, professional technicians, and fair pricing across residential and commercial plumbing services.

## Location
90 Harrison Brookville Rd, West Harrison, IN 47060
Service area: West Harrison, Harrison, Brookville, and surrounding Dearborn County communities in southeastern Indiana

## Contact
Phone: (812) 637-5800
Website: https://eckelplumbing.com/
Hours: Mon-Sun: 7:30 AM - 6:30 PM

## Services
- Toilet Repair & Installation: Repair and replacement of all toilet types including running toilets, clogs, and new installations
- Drain Cleaning: Professional clearing of clogged drains in kitchens, bathrooms, and main sewer lines
- Pipe Repair: Diagnosis and repair of leaking, burst, or corroded pipes throughout the home
- Gas Line Service: Installation, repair, and maintenance of residential and commercial gas lines
- Faucets & Fixtures: Installation and repair of kitchen and bathroom faucets, showerheads, and plumbing fixtures
- ADA Bathroom Renovations: Full bathroom remodeling with ADA-compliant accessibility features
- Water Heater Service: Diagnosis, repair, and replacement of water heaters
- Shower & Tub Faucet Replacement: Removal and professional installation of tub and shower valve assemblies

## Credentials
- BBB Accredited Business
- A+ BBB Rating
- Licensed and insured plumbing contractor in Indiana
- Family-owned and operated since 1976
- Listed on Angi with 4.7-star rating
- Birdeye verified with 4.5-star rating

## Team
- William E. Eckel, Owner, founded the company in 1976
- Aaron, Plumber/Technician
- Jim, Plumber/Technician
- The Kennedy brothers, Plumber/Technicians

## Reviews
4.5 stars, 30 reviews across Google, Birdeye, Angi, and Yelp
Selected quotes:
- "I've used Eckel Plumbing several times and they have been incredibly reliable and timely" -- Brian Newport
- "The plumbers were beyond professional, honest and very, very reliable" -- Kriston
- "Phenomenal people to work with. Excellent communication and quick turnaround" -- Google reviewer
- "They sent the Kennedy boys within literally a half hour and handled the issue with ease" -- Google reviewer
- "Friendly, experienced people over the years have always done a great job for me. I give them an A+" -- Repeat Customer
- "Plumber Aaron wore shoe coverings, was on time, got the job done professionally" -- Angi reviewer
- "Everyone that came was very professional, knowledgeable, courteous, called to tell us when to expect them" -- Bathroom Remodel Client
- "They quickly diagnosed an issue with our water heater and pointed out a nearby leaky pipe" -- Google reviewer

## Why Choose Eckel Plumbing Co
- Family-owned since 1976 with nearly 50 years of plumbing experience
- Open 7 days a week with extended hours (7:30 AM - 6:30 PM)
- 30-minute response times documented by customers
- Technicians wear shoe coverings and leave the work area clean
- Fair pricing with transparent communication about what each job involves
- A+ BBB rating with strong repeat customer loyalty
- Full bathroom renovation capability including ADA compliance

## About
Eckel Plumbing Co was founded by William E. Eckel in 1976 in West Harrison, Indiana. For nearly five decades the company has served southeastern Indiana with reliable, professional plumbing services. The business is built on honest diagnosis, fair pricing, and treating every customer's home with respect.
